suites.label: DC system: degree-of-success thresholds, nat20/nat1 degree adjustment, and level-based DC lookup
checks: roll >= DC and roll < DC+10 resolves to success
roll < DC and roll > DC-10 resolves to failure
Natural 20 bumps degree up one step (failure->success, success->crit_success)
Natural 1 bumps degree down one step (success->failure, crit_success->success)
Natural 20 already at critical_success stays critical_success
Natural 1 already at critical_failure stays critical_failure
simpleDC with 'low' difficulty returns value 2 less than moderate for given level
simpleDC with 'high' difficulty returns value 2 more than moderate for given level
Skill DC for trained proficiency at level 5 matches table value
resolveCheck(roll, DC, nat20=true) applies nat20 degree bump before returning
